name: codex-continuity
description: Codex continuity bundle. Adds structured ad-hoc capture, prior-session retrieval, read-only lifecycle context injection, and stop-time ad-hoc memory settling over the stock memories workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Lifecycle continuity tooling for Codex memory and sessions.
interface.longDescription: Adds lifecycle continuity on top of stock Codex memory without modifying codex-rs: capture skills write structured ad-hoc notes to ~/.codex/memories/extensions/ad_hoc/notes/, a retrieval MCP sidecar exposes project summary, search, related-file lookup, recent-decision lookup, session context, note draft, note settling, and workspace status tools, SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks inject relevant prior session context through additionalContext, and a fail-open Stop hook settles final session outcomes into ad-hoc notes or hash-protected ad-hoc note updates. The stock Phase 2 consolidation pipeline still owns durable MEMORY.md and memory_summary.md updates; this plugin enhances continuity around that pipeline rather than replacing it.
defaultPrompt: Finish this task, capture the root cause, and use memory retrieval when prior context may help.
Fix this bug, save a structured ad-hoc memory note, and search related files and past decisions in memory.
